response.overview: A film about a scrap metal merchant from the North East of England, who's aim in life is to get J.P. Richardson AKA the Big Bopper inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.  He travels to America to visit the place the Bopper last played and died, and to enlist help for his quest....
response.tagline: Meet John Cumberland, A Big Bopper fanatic!
response.title: Bopper & Me
